overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt traversing a snowy mountain landscape at night. The character walks along ridges and rocky terrain before running up a steep slope and turning around, with the camera following steadily from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ridge trail with pine forest edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy ridge path with swords strapped to back

entered.detail: snow-covered trail winding along the mountain ridge
dense evergreen trees lining the right side of the path
snow-capped peaks visible in the background under dark clouds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a narrow snowy mountain ridge at night. Pine trees line the right side of the path while distant snow-capped peaks are visible ahead under an overcast sky. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character moves forward along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain transition zone with scattered boulders

events.description: terrain transitions from snow-covered ridge to rocky mixed surface with less vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the path becomes rockier and the tree line recedes

entered.detail: exposed rock and gravel mixed with patches of snow
large rocks scattered across the mountainside

segments.scene_description: As Geralt progresses, the environment transitions from the forested ridge to a more open rocky area. The pine forest falls away to the right while the ground becomes increasingly rocky and uneven. The distant mountains shift to the left as the path curves through the barren terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow-covered mountain slope approaching steep incline

events.description: character transitions from walking to running across the open snow field

agents.ego_description: running across the open snow field toward a steep slope in the distance

entered.detail: wide expanse of deep snow covering the mountain slope
steep incline rising ahead with exposed rock faces

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens into a wide snow-covered field as Geralt breaks into a run. The rocky ground gives way to deep snow, and a steep mountain slope becomes visible ahead. The camera follows the character's increased pace as they approach the incline under the dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep snowy incline with forested valley below

events.description: character reaches the steep slope, turns around, and begins descending

agents.ego_description: running up the steep slope, then turning around to face the valley below while continuing to move

entered.detail: dense pine forest visible in the valley below the slope
tall stone structure visible on the horizon beyond the forest

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches the steep incline and turns around, revealing a forested valley below with a distant tower visible on the horizon. The character runs back down the slope, with the camera now facing the valley as the descent continues. The steep terrain dominates the foreground while the expansive landscape opens up behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, forested mountain ridge into a wide, open alpine landscape at night. It begins with Geralt walking along a snowy trail lined with pine trees, with distant peaks visible under an overcast sky. As the character progresses, the forest falls away to the right and the path curves through increasingly rocky and uneven terrain. The scene then opens into a wide, snow-covered field where the ground becomes deep snow, prompting Geralt to break into a run toward a steep mountain slope. Finally, as he reaches the incline and turns around, the camera reveals an expansive forested valley and a distant tower on the horizon while the character descends the slope.
